name: Kona Brewing Co. Hawaii Kai
tagline: Hawaii Kai's waterfront brewpub — solid food, great beer, and sunset views over the marina.
mustOrder: Longboard Lager or Big Wave on tap — always better on draft at the source
Kona Brewing pizza — wood-fired, crispy, better than expected
Poke nachos — ahi poke on won ton chips, great pupu
parking: Koko Marina Center parking lot. Plenty of spaces.
talkStory: Kona Brewing Company was founded in 1998 on the Big Island by father-son duo Cameron Healy and Spoon Khalsa. The Hawaii Kai brewpub in Koko Marina Center is their Oahu flagship and the beer is always fresher here on draft than anywhere else. The marina-side patio is perfect for sunset beers after a Hanauma Bay or Koko Head hike day. The wood-fired pizza is better than expected for a brewpub, and the poke nachos (ahi on won ton chips) are the best pupu on the menu. Good family spot.
